mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_reaction (user_id, post_id, reaction_type, axis, is_anonymous) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postId}, #{reactionType}, #{axis}, #{anonymous})
mapper.delete: DELETE pr FROM post_reaction pr JOIN user_privacy_policy upp ON upp.user_id = pr.user_id WHERE pr.post_id = #{postId} AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(upp.policy_json, CONCAT('$.reactionRetention.', LOWER(pr.reaction_type)))) = 'release'
mapper.update: UPDATE community_post cp SET cp.like_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction WHERE post_id = cp.id AND reaction_type = 'LIKE'), cp.dislike_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction WHERE post_id = cp.id AND reaction_type = 'DISLIKE'), cp.recommend_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction WHERE post_id = cp.id AND reaction_type = 'RECOMMEND'), cp.disrecommend_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction WHERE post_id = cp.id AND reaction_type = 'DISRECOMMEND'), cp.bookmark_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction WHERE post_id = cp.id AND reaction_type = 'BOOKMARK') WHERE cp.id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment_reaction (user_id, comment_id, reaction_type, axis, is_anonymous) VALUES (#{userId}, #{commentId}, #{reactionType}, #{axis}, #{anonymous})
